title: How many times have you watched Eva consecutively
display_title: How many times have you watched Eva consecutively
wikitext:
[]: How many times have you watched Eva consecutively?             Quote Post by AsukaChan » Wed Jan 30, 2008 6:01 am By that I mean .. how many times have you ever watched the entire series plus EoE (rinse, and repeat XD) back-to-back before you finally said enough is enough? I think I'm on my fourth time through in week. That is, I don't have control of the TV all day, so I watch it while I work at night and then pick up the following evening when everyone goes upstairs again. But whenever I have the TV, I pop in Eva. I dunno why I can keep going through over and over without getting tired of it, but I think it's because I go through systematically and try to pick out all the flaws and little details I read about, but never noticed. And I find I get a kick out of the dialogue now, because I almost know some of the episodes word for word. XD So? What was your longest Eva spree?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Jan 30, 2008 6:10 am Hmm, probably never. I didn't own EoE after I went through the series my first time, and I've only watched the series all the way through afterwards maybe once or twice with other people, but it wasn't back to back. All the other viewings was probably specific scenes or episodes.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jan 30, 2008 6:52 am Mostly the same as Ornette, except I had EoE available during my first viewing (albeit a shit nth-generation bootleg). I barely ever watch NGE all the way through since I get so much "overexposure" to it due to fandom. If I didn't, I'd probably just sit through the whole thing on a periodic basis, then shelve it for months.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Wed Jan 30, 2008 7:36 am I watched it all the way through 3 times before I got online and started reading about it. By that time, my urge to watch had been cooled and urge to discuss got heated, and I think I've only seen a few more times since then.

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Wed Jan 30, 2008 8:00 am I've done the marathon thing once. All episodes + teh movies. I've never watched the series more than one time in succession though.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Wed Jan 30, 2008 9:38 am It doesn't sound like you mean "watched in one sitting" but "watched beginning to end" I've done this 3 times....but keep in mind, I do watch 3-4 episodes at a stretch, out of order, every week or two when I'm looking for specific info.

[]:             Quote Post by shito » Wed Jan 30, 2008 10:14 am I never watched the entire series plus the movies in the same week, let alone in one sitting. Same as others here, when I first watched the series in VHS, EoE was kind of hard to find and only crappy bootleg VHS. I mostly watched from episodes 19 to 24 all the time, and EoE. Recently I've watched Renewal, all 26 TV episodes in one week, something I haven't done before and the 2nd time I watched the entire series (in order). Oh and it was also the first time I saw the director's cuts.

[]:             Quote Post by Kaysow » Wed Jan 30, 2008 2:15 pm Well I've seen it maybe four or five times in the past two years altogether, months inbetween. Why would I want to start right over after finishing it? That just detract from the replay value.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Jan 30, 2008 2:22 pm And another the same as Ornette -- closest to back-to-back was watching EoE, dub first then sub on two consecutive days almost 4 years ago, and not again since.

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Wed Jan 30, 2008 4:31 pm One complete watching at a time was quite enough for me. Never done repeated tries and I don't really want too.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Jan 30, 2008 4:52 pm All consecutively, once. After that it was just a few ep at a time or EoE.

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Thu Jan 31, 2008 12:29 am Same as Reichu, although I get enormously bored by the time it gets to Episodes 20-26. Same as Sachiel_13 as well. Normally I just watch one episode or another at a time, most commonly are Ep 1-19.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Jan 31, 2008 12:45 am BEsERk EVA01 wrote: Same as Reichu, although I get enormously bored by the time it gets to Episodes 20-26. Same as Sachiel_13 as well. Normally I just watch one episode or another at a time, most commonly are Ep 1-19.

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Thu Jan 31, 2008 12:49 am Fine, I have to admit, I like the action bits. But come on! Few people would want to go through the bits that pisses everybody off! Like the surreal train thing, and I'm only expressing my opinions, nothing wrong with that.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Jan 31, 2008 12:54 am Those bits and pieces are what got me hooked on to the show. I DEMAND SPLIT!!!

[]:             Quote Post by AsukaChan » Thu Jan 31, 2008 3:58 am This thread says something about myself. I don't if it's good or bad. XD I guess I'm just weird, since I'm able to watch it so many times, without skipping around. I know it doesn't make any sense to go through and then go right around and start over again, but I honestly got something else out of it each time -- other than something to keep me busy. For some reason I would miss things I hadn't noticed the first time I saw it ever, or the fourth time I ever saw it, or things I didn't notice when I watched an episode the day before. Perhaps it doesn't work for everyone, because your brains are probably working at full efficiency. XD

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Jan 31, 2008 5:19 am I definitely caught a lot of stuff that I missed on my subsequent viewings. But my first 2 viewings was non-stop ep1 to ep26 (and second time, with EoE), so a lot of the parts I wanted to see again was still fresh in my head.

[]:             Quote Post by Master Hand » Tue Apr 08, 2008 9:49 pm I've watched all episodes plus EOE just once.Tried doing it again but the first few episodes dont entertain me that much as the later ones do.

[]:             Quote Post by Steve » Tue Apr 08, 2008 10:45 pm Just once. When I got the Platinum set, a friend and I watched the whole series, then Death, then EoE in the span of about two weeks. We watched five or six episodes at a time. Back in the VHS days, I watched the whole series - without EoE - over a longer period of time (maybe a month or so).

[]:             Quote Post by birdyofthemoongoddess » Wed Apr 09, 2008 12:02 am I think I'd go insane if I had to watch the same anime back-to-back four times in a row (though, I have... about... 15 times in a row... or so...) Especially NGE since I haven't really watched much of it.
